political.s: FEC: $23K PAC donations; 76% to Republican, 24% to Democratic committees.

charity.s: $28M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.28% of revenue). JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #26 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Drucker Institute Management Top 250 — ranked #44 (2024) on customer satisfaction, employee engagement, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. Fortune World's Most Admired Companies — ranked #38 (2024).
charity.focus: Environmental sustainability, workforce development, community resilience, disaster relief, homelessness support, food security

environment.s: JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #26 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. CDP A-List (2024) — top tier for climate disclosure and emissions-reduction action. Climate-commitment coalition member: EP100 (since 2018). Doubling energy productivity (per-occupied-room) by 2030 globally.

dei.s: JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #26 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture.

animals.s: FishWise advised Hilton on responsible-seafood sourcing across global F&B. [FishWise partner]

privacy.s: DOJ ADA Title III: DOJ ADA settlement — Hilton agreed to make reservation policies, websites, and 200+ owned/managed properties accessible.

wiki.controversies:
== Controversies ==
=== Lodging of ICE officers ===

thumb|left|New York City Police Department Strategic Response Group|NYPD Strategic Response Group blocks protesters outside while police escort arrestees from Hilton TriBeCa hotel to jail truck

After the killing of Alex Pretti, protesters occupied a Hilton hotel in New York City that protesters believed lodged ICE officers resulting in dozens of arrests.
wiki.extract: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. is an American multinational hospitality company that manages and franchises a broad portfolio of hotels, resorts, and timeshare properties. Founded by Conrad Hilton in May 1919, the company is now led by Christopher J. Nassetta. Hilton is headquartered in Tysons, Virginia, United States.

cases.caseName: Hilton v. Equifax Information Services, LLC
Ballin v. Hilton Grand Vacations Management, LLC

cases.court: United States Bankruptcy Court, E.D. Washington
Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit

sampleFatalities.narrative: Miner was in the process of removing wedges on right side of tracked Jaw Feeder. During removal of the last wedge, the panel suddenly fell trapping the miner between the counterweight on excavator and the panel. The weight and force of the panel caused blunt force trauma to the chest and head.

sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee drank drain cleaner from an unmarked container, causing burns to their lips and mouth area. The employee was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to tripping on uneven surface
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee tripped at the transition point between a carpet and tile. Her head struck the wall and she suffered a head injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during maintenance, cleaning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was helping to unclog a packaging machine when their fingers got caught in the machine, resulting in partial amputations to the index, middle, and ring fingers on the right hand. The machine was energized at the time.

sampleRecords.employer: Hilton Marco Island Beach Resort and Spa
sampleRecords.event_description: Struck against moving part of machinery or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was slicing deli meat and sustained a laceration to the right thumb.

sampleRecords.employer: Embassy Suites by Hilton Jonesboro Red Wolf Convention Center
sampleRecords.event_description: Injured by slipping or swinging object held by injured worker
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On May 4, 2022, at 10:30 AM, an employee was preparing food with a knife when the blade contacted their left middle finger, resulting in amputation of the fingertip.

sampleRecalls.title: Epoca International Recalls Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridges Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Paris Hilton Mini Beauty Fridge sold in a 4-liter model in pink, white, aqua and hot pink and in a 10-liter model in pink and white. A label with the model number and serial number is located on the back of the unit for the 4-liter model and on the bottom of the unit for the 10-liter model. Pa…
hazards: The recalled mini fridge's electrical switch can short circuit, causing it to overheat, posing a fire and burn hazard.
injuries: The firm is aware of 27 reports of the mini fridge overheating and catching on fire. No injuries have been reported. Property damage has included damage to the unit and surrounding surfaces.

sampleRecalls.title: Backyard Nature Products Recalls Birds Choice Acrylic Bird Baths Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Birds Choice Hanging and Pole-Mounted Acrylic Bird Baths, which were sold in red, yellow and clear colors. The 14-inch wide in diameter bird bath includes a hanging chain and hook and pole mount. UPCs at the bottom of the back of the box include the following: SKU Description UPC AAP206 Clear Pole…
hazards: When sunlight goes through the recalled bird bath's acrylic surfaces onto nearby wooden surfaces, such as siding or decking, the wood surface can overheat, pos…
injuries: The firm has received two reports of the recalled bird baths causing overheating, smoking, fire and scorching to homes' decking and siding. No injuries have been reported.
products: Birds Choice Hanging and Pole-Mounted Acrylic Bird Baths

sampleRecalls.title: Gas Cylinders Recalled by Worthington Cylinders Wisconsin Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: The cylinders contain propylene gas and are used for soldering, brazing, cutting and welding. They contain 14.1 oz Map-Pro, 14.1 oz Propylene or 16 oz MAPP (Methyl Acetylene Propadiene Stabilized). The cylinders are approximately 3" in diameter and 11" tall and are either yellow or black in color. They were sold alone…
hazards: The seal on the cylinders can leak after torches or other fuel consuming equipment are disconnected from them, posing a fire hazard.
products: Map Pro, Propylene and MAPP Gas Cylinders
units: 29,026,000 units in the U.S.; 1,371,100 units in Canada

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, Hilton Hotels Corporation Announce Recall of Vacation Station™ Children's Cooler/Chairs
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled product is a multi-use product that can be used as both a child's chair or a food/beverage storage cooler. The cooler/chairs were given to hotel guests as a welcoming gift at participating Hilton®, Doubletree®, and Hilton Garden Inn® hotels and resorts. The chairs have either a purple aluminum frame with …
hazards: When the chair collapses, the folding mechanism can pose a crushing, cutting or severing hazard to consumers' fingers.
injuries: CPSC and Hilton Hotels are aware of one report in which part of a 2-year-old boy's fingertip was severed when the chair collapsed.
